response:
The attic held only dust and forgotten things—until the floorboard creaked.

<cap>Secrets<cap> are heavy. Hers was a locket, cold against her palm. Inside, a face that was hers, but not.

<cap>Truth<cap> arrived uninvited. It whispered in the hollows of the house, in the silence between heartbeats.

She closed the locket. Some <cap>burdens<cap> are meant to be carried alone, in quiet, where they cannot break anything else.
